news.text: A Google AI breakthrough is pressuring memory chip stocks from Samsung to Micron
Israel took Iran's Araqchi, Qalibaf off hit list after Pakistan request to US, Pakistani source says - Reuters
Europe scales back climate goals to ease Iran war energy shock - Reuters
South Korea to carry out bond buyback, expand fuel tax breaks to cushion blow from Iran conflict - Reuters
Iran war damage to Qatar hits global LNG outlook, upends Asia demand growth - Reuters
Used EV sales jump in Europe as Iran war drives up petrol prices - Reuters

brief:
◆ Market Overview

Futures are painting green across the board with small caps leading the charge (+1.22% on IWM) as VIX drops 2.17% to 34.25. The Iran war headlines continue to dominate price action, but markets are showing resilience with SPY testing $656.82 resistance pre-market.

◆ What to Watch

  • Google AI breakthrough - Memory chip stocks under pressure; watch MU, Samsung ADRs for continuation
  • Iran conflict developments - Multiple ceasefire headlines creating volatility; energy and defense plays remain active
  • Earnings light - LOVE reports BMO with $2.05 EPS estimate; small earnings slate keeps focus on macro
  • Bond buybacks - South Korea expanding stimulus measures; watch currency and Asia ETFs

◆ Sector Rotation

Materials leading (+1.98%) as war premium persists, followed by Healthcare (+1.00%) in classic defensive rotation. Energy lagging (-0.44%) despite geopolitical tensions, suggesting supply disruption fears may be overblown. Tech holding modest gains (+0.45%) but memory chip weakness from Google AI news creating sector headwinds.
✦ Bull Case
VIX dropping below 35 with small caps outperforming suggests risk appetite returning. Materials strength indicates industrial demand holding up despite geopolitical noise.
⚡ Key Driver
Iran ceasefire headlines creating whipsaw action in energy and safe havens. Any concrete progress could trigger significant rotation out of defensive positions.

◆ Levels That Matter

  • SPY 657 - Pre-market high, break above could target 660
  • QQQ 590 - Key resistance level; Google AI news creates tech headwinds here
  • VIX 32 - Break below signals continued volatility compression
  • XLB 95 - Materials ETF testing breakout levels on war premium

Not a prediction. A preparation. Make your plan before the bell.
